# Harshit Ghosh

> Building at the intersection of biology and AI. Based in the SF Bay Area.

## About
- Name: Harshit Ghosh
- Email: harshitghosh@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/harshit-ghosh
- GitHub: https://github.com/deepmind11
- Interests: deep learning for biology (protein language models, structure prediction, generative chemistry, foundation models for biology) and agentic systems that use these models to reason in the real world.

## Featured projects
- [VariantAgent](https://hgz-portfolio.harshitghosh.workers.dev/projects/variantagent/): Multi-agent ACMG variant interpretation. LangGraph + MCP. Six specialist agents over ClinVar, gnomAD, Ensembl VEP, PubMed.
- [CovalentAgent](https://hgz-portfolio.harshitghosh.workers.dev/projects/covalentagent/): Multi-agent system for covalent drug design. ESM-2, RDKit, Chemprop.
- [Constella](https://hgz-portfolio.harshitghosh.workers.dev/projects/constella/): Voice synthesis with native English-Spanish code-switching.
- [ClinicOps Copilot](https://hgz-portfolio.harshitghosh.workers.dev/projects/clinic-ops-copilot/): Natural-language query agent over a synthetic FHIR R4 dataset.

## Skills
Pipeline engineering (Nextflow, Snakemake), Python, R, SQL, AWS (S3, Batch, Lambda, Bedrock), Terraform, Docker, multi-agent AI systems (LangGraph, MCP, Claude, OpenRouter), bioinformatics tooling (Samtools, GATK, VarDict, PySAM).
